title: Enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation Component 1
content: This is the detailed specification for component 1 in the RAG framework. It handles vector search optimization, embedding caching, and semantic routing across distributed nodes. To ensure robust retrieval performance under high load, this module utilizes token-level chunking with an overlap of 15% and enforces strict metadata filtering prior to vector similarity computation.
